description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in period-inspired urban attire, featuring a long overcoat layered over a buttoned vest and collared shirt. The figure wears fitted trousers tucked into tall socks or gaiters, and classic shoes. A flat cap sits atop the head, complementing the vintage look. The face is clean-shaven, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The overall appearance suggests a historical or early 20th-century city dweller, possibly inspired by working-class or detective archetypes.
description: A male adult in vintage urban clothing, including a long overcoat, vest, collared shirt, flat cap, and classic shoes, evoking an early 20th-century city dweller.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full outfit, including the overcoat, vest, collared shirt, and flat cap, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the overcoat, the profile of the cap, and the fitted trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the overcoat, the back of the cap, and the straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the overcoat's drape and the side profile of the head and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: long overcoat, buttoned vest, collared shirt, fitted trousers, flat cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
